metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the bike-mobility domain.

children.name: Employer Policy & Program Management
children.description: Configures employer-level mobility programs including subsidy logic, plan design, market variations, approval rules, and policy governance.

children.name: Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator
children.description: Calculates rider and employer cost scenarios, subsidy rules, and savings projections before enrollment or policy changes.

children.name: Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync
children.description: Synchronizes employee eligibility, payroll deductions, employment events, and employer master data with HR and payroll systems.

children.name: Bike Catalog & Recommendation
children.description: Presents bike, accessory, and package choices with recommendation logic based on commute profile, employer policy, and local availability.

children.name: Order Orchestration & Checkout
children.description: Runs the end-to-end ordering flow including approvals, signatures, reservations, order routing, and state transitions.

children.name: Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience
children.description: Provides rider login, document wallet, order and claim visibility, support entry points, and self-service lifecycle actions.

children.name: Dealer & Service Partner Network Management
children.description: Onboards and governs dealer and service partners, manages coverage, credentials, SLAs, and partner performance.

children.name: Stock, Availability & Handover Planning
children.description: Tracks inventory, reservations, appointment capacity, and fulfillment readiness across dealers and service partners.

children.name: Service Case & Maintenance Orchestration
children.description: Coordinates diagnostics, maintenance, repair, inspections, replacement, and service closure workflows.

children.name: Insurance & Claims Administration
children.description: Manages policy application, claim intake, evidence collection, approvals, reimbursement, and replacement workflows.

children.name: Lease Origination & Credit Decisioning
children.description: Supports lease proposal creation, underwriting inputs, credit checks where applicable, and contract activation readiness.

children.name: Contract Lifecycle Management
children.description: Manages quotes, contracts, amendments, renewals, pauses, offboarding, and audit-ready contract history.

children.name: Settlement, Invoicing & Payroll Reconciliation
children.description: Handles employer invoicing, payroll deduction reconciliation, dealer settlement, and dispute-aware financial controls.

children.name: Remarketing, Refurbishment & Resale
children.description: Captures residual value through bike return, refurbish, resale, and next-life inventory flows.

children.name: Pool Bike & Fleet Management
children.description: Supports pooled and assigned bike assets with booking, assignment, access, policy enforcement, and asset-state management.

children.name: Trip, Telematics & Asset Monitoring
children.description: Collects usage, trip, and asset telemetry where operationally justified and legally permitted.

children.name: Identity & Access Management
children.description: Provides multi-tenant identity, authentication, authorization, and role-based access for riders, employers, partners, and internal teams.

children.name: Enterprise Integration Layer
children.description: Offers connectors, canonical data models, and event-driven integration with HRIS, payroll, ERP, CRM, and finance systems.

children.name: API Gateway & Developer Experience
children.description: Provides secure external and partner APIs, keys, throttling, documentation, and lifecycle governance.

children.name: Eventing & Process Backbone
children.description: Streams business events and coordinates asynchronous workflows across ordering, service, claims, and finance.

children.name: Workflow, Case & Exception Management
children.description: Supports multi-step back-office workflows, exception handling, SLA tracking, and coordinated resolution across teams.

children.name: Communications & Notifications
children.description: Handles triggered and human-in-the-loop communication across email, SMS, push, and in-app messages.

children.name: Operational Data, KPI & Analytics Platform
children.description: Creates the shared data foundation for operational reporting, unit economics, executive KPIs, and market-level performance analysis.

children.name: Compliance, Privacy & Audit Controls
children.description: Implements privacy, consent, auditability, financial control, and tax-sensitive compliance requirements across markets.

children.name: Observability & Reliability Operations
children.description: Provides logging, metrics, alerting, incident response, service health, and reliability management for the platform.
